title: Carpathia's Confirmed Response — Signal Log
description: A page torn from the Marconi Room's incoming signal log shows Carpathia's 12:25 AM response to the SOS: her position as 41°10'N 52°14'W, speed 17 knots, ETA approximately 4:00 AM. The log also shows a crossed-out Frankfurt entry — the Frankfurt operator initially misread the position and had to retransmit, losing six minutes. The confirmed Carpathia course is circled in pencil by Bride.
